title: Red Moon Whiskey Gravy
description: A kid-friendly Irish dish featuring a bitter and chewy gravy made with red wine and whiskey for low-sodium enjoyment.

ingredients.name: Carrots, peeled and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add carrots and celery to the pan. Cook for another 3-4 minutes or until vegetables start to soften slightly.
Pour in red wine and reduce it by half, stirring occasionally.
Stir in whiskey (if using low-sodium version). Let simmer for a few minutes more until reduced.
Whisk in all-purpose flour and cook for about 1 minute to activate the flour’s gluten. This step is crucial for creating a gravy-like consistency.
Gradually stir in chicken broth, allowing the mixture to come back to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 20 minutes until thickened, stirring occasionally.
Strain if necessary to remove any solids from the gravy. Adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
